label: Human Trigger
description: Start an execution when a human submits a form. Form fields determine the output ports via form_field_specs.

inputs.name: title
inputs.label: Title
inputs.description: Title the user sees at the top of the form.

inputs.name: fields
inputs.label: Form fields
inputs.description: Each field contributes an output port per its fieldType (see form_field_specs).

then.message: HumanTrigger '{id}' has no form fields; the user would see an empty form.
